steps.title: Locate the main verb
steps.content: The sentence's main subject is "A 2024 study," and its main verb is "offers." The blank should add information about what the study reported without creating a competing main verb.

steps.title: Keep one main verb
steps.content: A, B, and C are finite verbs, so each would create an extra main verb before "offers." A participle can modify the study while leaving "offers" as the only main verb. The answer is D.
